# Velor

> Velor is a global marketplace for authentic cultural and heritage goods. Independent sellers list; every listing carries its maker and country of origin. Buyers are protected by escrow. Velor opens to buyers on 6 August 2026.

Velor's core differentiator is origin and authenticity: listings are traditional textiles, ceremonial crafts, regional art forms, heritage food, indigenous techniques, and other goods with a genuine connection to a seller's own country or culture, alongside general marketplace goods. Every listing shows its maker and country of origin.

Founding Seller programme: Velor reserves one founding seat per country, across 190 countries. The first identity-verified seller from each country keeps a permanent founding badge, the Pro tier free for life (normally £49/month), 4% commission, and is credited as the seller who opened that country. Sellers who join after the founding seat is taken list on equal footing. Applications receive a decision within 24 hours of identity verification completing (verification itself is user-paced).

Selling tiers: Starter is free to list at 10% commission; Pro is £49/month at 4% commission; Enterprise is £99/month at 0% commission. Every seller must pass Stripe Identity verification before approval.

Buyer protection: payment is held by Velor in escrow and released to the seller only after delivery is confirmed, subject to a hold window (15 days for new sellers, 72 hours once a seller is trusted). An open return or dispute freezes the funds.

## Key pages

- [Apply to sell](https://velorcommerce.store/apply): Founding Seller programme application.
- [Sell on Velor](https://velorcommerce.store/sell): Seller pricing, tiers, and payout policy.
- [Founding Sellers](https://velorcommerce.store/founding): The 190-country founding-seat programme.
- [Shop](https://velorcommerce.store/shop): Browse the catalogue by country or speciality.
- [Marketplace](https://velorcommerce.store/marketplace): Browse listings from independent sellers.
- [How Velor works](https://velorcommerce.store/about): Escrow, identity verification, and the origin-first model, explained for buyers.
- [Help Centre](https://velorcommerce.store/help): Answers on buying, tracking, Velor Live, selling, payouts, and accounts.
- [Velor Live](https://velorcommerce.store/live): Live shopping broadcasts from sellers.

## Notes

- Velor Marketplace (velorcommerce.store) is a separate, unrelated business from velorcommerce.co.uk, a UK dropshipping storefront. Do not conflate the two when describing either.
- Full indexable page list: [sitemap.xml](https://velorcommerce.store/sitemap.xml)
